session.user:
Run the following commands and report results:
1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && make fast-ci`
Report the full output. Focus on whether all steps pass. Note: the two docs/learned markdown files (github-review-decision.md and status-indicators.md) are pre-existing and not part of this change â€” ignore them if they show up again.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target to validate code

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. âś“ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1737 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [109 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command **failed** with exit code 2. The issue is a **Prettier formatting check failure** on 2 files:
**Failed Files:** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Summary:**
| Step | Status | Notes | |------|--------|-------| | Lint (ruff) | âś“ PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check (ruff format) | âś“ PASSED | 1737 files already formatted | | **Prettier Check** | **FAILED** | Code style issues found in 2 files | | AGENTS.md standard | âś“ PASSED | | | CLAUDE.md pairing | âś“ PASSED | 19 files, 0 violations | | Markdown Check | âś“ PASSED | | | Exec Reference Check | âś“ PASSED | | | ty (type check) | âś“ PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | âś“ PASSED | 6024 tests passed in 15.01s | | Unit Tests (erk-dev) | âś“ PASSED | 136 tests passed in 6.17s | | Unit Tests (erk-statusline) | âś“ PASSED | 115 tests passed in 0.86s | | Unit Tests (erk-mcp) | âś“ PASSED | (output truncated) |
The failure is in the Prettier formatting check. These markdown files need to be reformatted. As noted in your instructions, the two pre-existing markdown files shown here are not part of the current change and should be ignored.
